initiatives.name: Feed Durham NC
initiatives.description: A grassroots mutual aid collective organizing food distribution and community support in Durham. They coordinate food rescue, resource sharing, and direct support while building sustainable networks of food access and community care.

initiatives.name: Durham Beyond Policing
initiatives.description: A grassroots coalition organizing mutual aid and community support while building towards a Durham that invests in people, not police. They coordinate resource sharing, direct support initiatives, and community organizing while advocating for transformative justice and community-led safety solutions.

initiatives.name: Pauli Murray Center for History & Social Justice
initiatives.description: A historic site and community center dedicated to advancing social justice through preserving the legacy of Rev. Dr. Pauli Murray, a groundbreaking civil rights activist, legal scholar, feminist, author, and Episcopal priest. They coordinate educational programs, community dialogues, arts initiatives, and mutual aid organizing while connecting Durham's history of activism to contemporary human rights issues.

initiatives.name: Rainbow Collective for Change
initiatives.description: An organization building mutual aid networks and community support for LGBTQ+ families with children in Durham. They coordinate direct support through playgroups, educational programs, and family resources while building inclusive spaces and advocating for LGBTQ+ family equity through community organizing and solidarity networks.

initiatives.name: Triangle Art for Aid
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing art-based fundraising and community support in the Triangle area. They coordinate resource sharing and direct support through art sales and creative initiatives while building networks of solidarity between artists and community needs.

initiatives.name: Durham Prison Letters
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective providing support and connection to incarcerated individuals in Durham through letter writing and resource sharing. They coordinate correspondence, educational materials, and solidarity networks while working to break isolation and build connections between communities inside and outside prison walls.

initiatives.name: Comrades in the Commons
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing community support and resource sharing in Durham. They coordinate direct support initiatives, solidarity networks, and community education while building power through collective action and grassroots organizing.

initiatives.name: People's Solidarity Hub
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing community support and resource sharing in Durham. They coordinate direct support initiatives, solidarity networks, and community spaces while building sustainable networks of mutual aid through shared resources, education, and collective organizing.

initiatives.name: Triangle Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Point of connection between residents, communities + mutual aid projects in Carrboro, Hillsborough, Durham + Chapel Hill.

initiatives.name: Carrboro Free Market
initiatives.description: A community-driven mutual aid initiative organizing free resource sharing and distribution in Carrboro. They coordinate regular free markets, facilitate direct community support, and build networks of solidarity through the exchange of goods, resources, and skills.

initiatives.name: Triangle Healthcare Radicals
initiatives.description: A collective of healthcare workers organizing mutual aid and community support initiatives in the Triangle region. They coordinate resource sharing, health education, and direct support while building networks of solidarity and care to address healthcare access and equity in North Carolina communities.

initiatives.name: Triangle Abortion Access
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing support and resources for abortion access in the Triangle region. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building community power to ensure reproductive healthcare accessibility and justice.

initiatives.name: Triangle Guerrilla Cinema
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing free film screenings and cultural programming in the Triangle region. They coordinate community resources, educational events, and direct support while building networks of solidarity through accessible arts and radical cinema.
